name: pounce
description: Codex-native dependency vetting and supply-chain guardrails for AI-assisted coding.

interface.shortDescription: Vet dependency releases before Codex writes or installs them
interface.longDescription: Pounce is a local Codex plugin for dependency vetting, onboarding sweeps, and shell-time install guardrails aimed at supply-chain incidents and risky fresh releases.
defaultPrompt: Vet axios@1.14.1 before adding it to this project
Sweep this repo for IOC exposure from recent package compromises
Recommend the safest exact package version for this dependency
